name: Murmuration Phantom
description: Starling murmuration simulation — thousands of dark birds flowing in organic, ever-changing shapes against a twilight sky. The flock morphs between coherent structures driven by a curl noise flow field, with individual birds only visible as subtle silver glints at the edges. Bass drives flock density, mids morph between swarm shapes, treble adds edge glints, and mouse creates predator disturbance.

params.name: Flock Size
params.description: Overall size and spread of the flock

params.name: Shape Morph
params.description: Morph between sphere, torus, wave, and random flock shapes

params.name: Glint Intensity
params.description: Brightness of silver edge glints where light catches individual birds

params.name: Cohesion
params.description: How tightly the flock holds together
